data.author: sukhrajklair
data.message:
simple state machine with an action client and a topic subscriber (#543)

* create a simple state machine with two states, one action server client and one subscriber client

* added the template copyright and license info to all code files

* renamed package and files to fit the established naming convention

* added missing license for mode_selection_client and orhtogonals files

* moved license to the top of the cl_mode_select.hpp file

* fixed formatting errors

---------

Co-authored-by: Sukhraj Klair <sukhraj.k@radskunkworks.com>

data.author: nuclearsandwich
data.message:
Add test dependencies on Humble branch. (#516)

ament_lint_auto nor ament_lint_common are not listed as dependencies for
smacc2_msgs. ament_lint_auto is required due to the `find_package` call
and while `ament_lint_common` is not mentioned by name, ament_lint_auto
will only work if there are ament_lint packages present for it to
configure.

This is causing the build failures mentioned in
https://github.com/robosoft-ai/SMACC2/issues/508#issuecomment-1591685849
